zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna Sybella de Gatton於大約1090年出生在英國英格蘭肯特金斯頓時，她的父親Lord Robert de Gatton16歲，母親Lady Mabel de Turnham15歲。她於大約1120年與Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst在英國肯特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1163年在英國素可享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna Sybella de Gatton于大约1090年出生在英国英格兰肯特金斯頓时，她的父亲Lord Robert de Gatton16岁，母亲Lady Mabel de Turnham15岁。她于大约1120年与Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst在英国肯特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1163年在英国素可享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gatton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Sussex and Surrey): habitational name for someone from a place in Surrey so named, from Old English gāt ‘goat’ + tūn ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Gatten
meanings: English: variant of   Gatton  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

nameMeanings.name: Sybella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern name, apparently derived from   Isabella   by the dropping of the initial vowel.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna Sybella de Gatton was born about 1090, in Kingston, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, Lord Robert de Gatton, was 16 and her mother, Lady Mabel de Turnham, was 15. She married Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst about 1120, in Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1163, in Sussex, England, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna Sybella de Gatton est née environ 1090, à Kingston, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord Robert de Gatton, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Lady Mabel de Turnham, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst environ 1120, à Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1163, à Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.Of, Buckhurst, Sussex, England: Buckhurst by Withyham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Johanna Sybella de Gatton um 1090 in Kingston, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord Robert de Gatton 16 und ihre Mutter Lady Mabel de Turnham 15. Sie hat um 1120 in Kent, England Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1163 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Sussex, England.

Lei sposato Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst circa 1120, nel Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1163, nel Sussex, England, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna Sybella de Gattonが約1090年にイギリスイギリスケントキングストンで生まれた時，父Lord Robert de Gattonは16歳，母Lady Mabel de Turnhamは15歳であった。約1120年にイギリスケントでRalph de Dene of Buckhurstと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1163年にイギリススセックスで74歳で死去した。

ko.Of, Buckhurst, Sussex, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 벅후르스트 비 위스이함
ko.lifeSummary: Johanna Sybella de Gatton(이)가 대략 1090년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 킨그스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Robert de Gatton(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Mabel de Turnham(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 대략 1120년 영국 켄트에서 Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1163년 영국 수세스에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Sybella de Gatton nasceu aproximadamente 1090, em Kingston, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lord Robert de Gatton, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Lady Mabel de Turnham, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst aproximadamente 1120, em Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1163, em Sussex, Inglaterra, com 74 anos.

ru.Of, Buckhurst, Sussex, England: буккхурст би витихам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna Sybella de Gatton родилась около 1090 г. в местности кингстон, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Lord Robert de Gatton было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Mabel de Turnham, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst около 1120 г. в местности кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1163 г. в местности суссекс, Англия в возрасте 74 лет.

Se casó con Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst aproximadamente 1120, en Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1163, en Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 74 años.
